---
title: "Science as Amateur Software Development"
author: "Richard McElreath"
date: "2026-03-23"
date-added: "2026-03-24"
categories: [science, research, software, video]
status: to-watch
url: "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zwRdO9_GGhY"
---

Talk by Richard McElreath on science as amateur software development.

[Watch →](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zwRdO9_GGhY)
